title: Throwable Spear
description: Throwable Spear does exactly what its name suggests: it allows spears to be thrown.
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/THROWABLE_SPEAR/MP_THROWABLE_SPEAR_Header.webp) Throwable Spear does exactly what its name suggests: it allows spears to be thrown. Why isn’t this possible in Vanilla Minecraft? ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/THROWABLE_SPEAR/MP_THROWABLE_SPEAR_Description.webp) From now on, you can use the mouse wheel to throw them, deal damage to enemies from a distance, and get much more out of them. Spears become a far more useful and versatile option than before. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/THROWABLE_SPEAR/MP_THROWABLE_SPEAR_Faq.webp) ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ### Can I record a video of this mod and show it on my channel? Sure, you are free to play this mod or any of our modpacks on your channel and make a video about it, in fact, we would be very grateful for it! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/THROWABLE_SPEAR/MP_THROWABLE_SPEAR_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DmNzMhDp/images/fa389c0fd69e14c0ff8d9e3d329c2bc1c6f17cb1.jpeg) ![Screennshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DmNzMhDp/images/3a5db97f361a561cd84d4bce0a32dcab88252469.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DmNzMhDp/images/cd99639d0eabede33785d12cf527f31c8a6220f4.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
